title: THE HUB - 211info
text: THE HUB THE HUB Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a recovery-oriented drop-in center where participants can sit, have a snack, and connect with others. Services include case management and information and referral to community resources, job finding assistance and employment support. Offers a variety of support groups that cover topics such as wellness, Medication Assisted Treatment (MAT) Education, and making connections. Assist with low-barrier access to treatment services and provides peer support for substance-related issues. Substance use and mental health assessments can be done by telehealth. Provides referrals for MAT. Distributes naloxone and offers education in partnership with other agencies. 404 SW 5th Street Grants Pass, OR 97526 Eligibility: Age 18 and older Hours: Monday/Tuesday/Thursday/Friday 9am-5pm, Wednesday 9am-12:30pm and 3pm-5pm (541) 916-5723 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 916-5723 Main phone Main phone (541) 916-5723 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Jackson and Josephine Counties Services: Assessment for Substance Use Disorders Case/Care Management * Substance Use Disorder Issues Drop In Centers * Substance Use Disorder Issues General Addictions/Substance Use Disorder Support Groups Job Finding Assistance * Substance Use Disorder Issues Mental Health Evaluation Peer Mental Health Support Services * Substance Use Disorder Issues Specialized Information and Referral * Substance Use Disorder Issues If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. THE HUB
